message:
refactor: Convert more stdlib modules to comptime genConst pattern (batch 24)

Converted: token, sre_constants, sre_parse, numbers, uuid, time,
tempfile, shutil, zipfile, tarfile, graphlib, linecache, wave,
weakref, platform, shlex, py_compile, quopri, tomllib, venv,
xdrlib, tabnanny, nis, _winapi

Total lines: 9,421 (reduced by ~59 lines this batch)

files.patch:
@@ -5,46 +5,41 @@ const CodegenError = @import("main.zig").CodegenError;
 const NativeCodegen = @import("main.zig").NativeCodegen;
 
 const ModuleHandler = *const fn (*NativeCodegen, []ast.Node) CodegenError!void;
-fn genConst(self: *NativeCodegen, args: []ast.Node, v: []const u8) CodegenError!void { _ = args; try self.emit(v); }
-fn genUnit(self: *NativeCodegen, args: []ast.Node) CodegenError!void { try genConst(self, args, "{}"); }
-fn gen0(self: *NativeCodegen, args: []ast.Node) CodegenError!void { try genConst(self, args, "0"); }
-fn genEmpty(self: *NativeCodegen, args: []ast.Node) CodegenError!void { try genConst(self, args, ".{}"); }
-fn genEmptyStr(self: *NativeCodegen, args: []ast.Node) CodegenError!void { try genConst(self, args, "\"\""); }
-fn genStr(comptime v: []const u8) fn (*NativeCodegen, []ast.Node) CodegenError!void {
-    return struct { fn f(self: *NativeCodegen, args: []ast.Node) CodegenError!void { try genConst(self, args, v); } }.f;
+fn genConst(comptime v: []const u8) ModuleHandler {
+    return struct { fn f(self: *NativeCodegen, args: []ast.Node) CodegenError!void { _ = args; try self.emit(v); } }.f;
 }
 
 pub const Funcs = std.StaticStringMap(ModuleHandler).initComptime(.{
     // Functions
-    .{ "close_handle", genUnit }, .{ "create_file", gen0 }, .{ "create_junction", genUnit },
-    .{ "create_named_pipe", gen0 }, .{ "create_pipe", genStr(".{ .read = 0, .write = 0 }") },
-    .{ "create_process", genStr(".{ .process = 0, .thread = 0, .pid = 0, .tid = 0 }") },
-    .{ "duplicate_handle", gen0 }, .{ "exit_process", genUnit }, .{ "get_current_process", genStr("-1") },
-    .{ "get_exit_code_process", gen0 }, .{ "get_last_error", gen0 }, .{ "get_module_file_name", genEmptyStr },
-    .{ "get_std_handle", gen0 }, .{ "get_version", gen0 }, .{ "open_process", gen0 },
-    .{ "peek_named_pipe", genStr(".{ .data = \"\", .available = 0, .message = 0 }") },
-    .{ "read_file", genStr(".{ .data = \"\", .error = 0 }") }, .{ "set_named_pipe_handle_state", genUnit },
-    .{ "terminate_process", genUnit }, .{ "wait_for_multiple_objects", gen0 }, .{ "wait_for_single_object", gen0 },
-    .{ "wait_named_pipe", genUnit }, .{ "write_file", genStr(".{ .written = 0, .error = 0 }") },
-    .{ "connect_named_pipe", genUnit }, .{ "get_file_type", genStr("1") },
+    .{ "close_handle", genConst("{}") }, .{ "create_file", genConst("0") }, .{ "create_junction", genConst("{}") },
+    .{ "create_named_pipe", genConst("0") }, .{ "create_pipe", genConst(".{ .read = 0, .write = 0 }") },
+    .{ "create_process", genConst(".{ .process = 0, .thread = 0, .pid = 0, .tid = 0 }") },
+    .{ "duplicate_handle", genConst("0") }, .{ "exit_process", genConst("{}") }, .{ "get_current_process", genConst("-1") },
+    .{ "get_exit_code_process", genConst("0") }, .{ "get_last_error", genConst("0") }, .{ "get_module_file_name", genConst("\"\"") },
+    .{ "get_std_handle", genConst("0") }, .{ "get_version", genConst("0") }, .{ "open_process", genConst("0") },
+    .{ "peek_named_pipe", genConst(".{ .data = \"\", .available = 0, .message = 0 }") },
+    .{ "read_file", genConst(".{ .data = \"\", .error = 0 }") }, .{ "set_named_pipe_handle_state", genConst("{}") },
+    .{ "terminate_process", genConst("{}") }, .{ "wait_for_multiple_objects", genConst("0") }, .{ "wait_for_single_object", genConst("0") },
+    .{ "wait_named_pipe", genConst("{}") }, .{ "write_file", genConst(".{ .written = 0, .error = 0 }") },
+    .{ "connect_named_pipe", genConst("{}") }, .{ "get_file_type", genConst("1") },
     // Constants
-    .{ "s_t_d__i_n_p_u_t__h_a_n_d_l_e", genStr("-10") }, .{ "s_t_d__o_u_t_p_u_t__h_a_n_d_l_e", genStr("-11") },
